system.label: Booking & calendar admin
system.painHero: Day and overnight staycation bookings stack up on Messenger — see the calendar fill and confirm private resort dates without double-booking.

quotation.packageScope: One-page responsive website only (amenities, gallery, about, FAQ, contact). Admin preview is a sample; production booking system priced separately.
quotation.paymentTerms: 50% upfront to begin · 50% on delivery (not the full amount upfront)

outreach.notes: No public email on Facebook About — outreach via Messenger/SMS/call. Ask before any email send if an address appears later.

sources.intro: Open Daytime 8am to 5pm and Overnight 8pm to 5am (Private Resort in Montalban Rizal)
sources.address: 220 E. Manuel St. Brgy. San Jose, Rodriguez, Philippines, 1860
sources.notes: Scraped logged-out via Chrome DevTools MCP (About + Photos). No public email. Assets: cover 2048×1536, logo 2048×2048, venue/event gallery (~939–1074px) via signed fbcdn curl + Facebook referer. Wedding/venue styling on Photos — marketed as private resort staycation.
